title: NextGenerationEU debt = NextGeneration’s problem?
summary_full: This is Victoria Becker bringing you this week’s BUDGET BRIEF on the EU’s next seven-year spending plan. This week, we’ll examine why the EU’s blockbuster pandemic-era debt might become a problem for future generations. We’ll also discuss the film industry’s call to futureproof Europe’s (almost) one-Oscar-a-year output, the Council’s partial agreement on the bloc’s flagship mobility and training […]
